commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The PR has a narrow validation defect, but the protected maintainer draft also needs human compatibility and security-boundary acceptance before merge.; Needs attention: The diff leaves a concrete security-boundary concern in native exec approval policy validation.; Review finding: [P1] Reject empty native approval rule fields — packages/gateway-protocol/src/schema/exec-approvals.ts:84-85 (sha=f14bcae0c03f08306d551b494cd30d45fa804ebd)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes gateway protocol payloads, CLI gateway auth, node/device pairing, Windows node exec approval RPCs, and Control UI read-only rendering for native node approval snapshots.

PR surface: Source +1127, Tests +2657. Total +3784 across 60 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows NativeExecApprovalRuleSchema accepts empty pattern/action strings while the CLI rejects them and the gateway forwards native policies after validation. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR has a narrow validation defect, but the protected maintainer draft also needs human compatibility and security-boundary acceptance before merge.

target.title: fix(cli): harden Windows node pairing and approvals
target.body:
## Summary
- preserve stable Windows node/device identity across reconnects and same-key metadata refresh approvals, while still rotating unsafe/stale/revoked/mismatched device tokens
- harden node pairing approval authz, pending/paired node presentation, and gateway node-event routing so Windows nodes are less likely to fall back to manual/TUI repair paths
- route devices/nodes/gateway CLI RPC helpers through direct local gateway-client auth for explicit loopback shared token/password calls, without letting stale inactive env/config tokens suppress device-token fallback
- make host-native Windows exec approval get/set payloads work through the dedicated `exec.approvals.node.*` gateway methods, including native payloads that omit `payloadJSON`
- block raw `node.invoke systemExecApprovals.*` / `system.execApprovals.*` policy mutation paths and keep exec policy mutation on audited dedicated methods
- render host-native Windows node exec approval snapshots read-only in Control UI, including normalization for malformed node-supplied rules
- clarify the `nodes invoke system.run` CLI error so users are pointed to agent `/exec host=node`, not a nonexistent `openclaw exec` command

## Draft Snapshot
Current pushed draft head: `f14bcae0c03f08306d551b494cd30d45fa804ebd`.

This is pushed for review now. It remains draft because the broad changed gate is still blocked by existing repo-wide oxlint debt, not by touched files in this branch.

## Proof On This Snapshot
- `git diff --check` passed.
- Touched CLI lint passed: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/cli/nodes-cli/register.invoke.ts src/cli/nodes-cli.coverage.test.ts`.
- Focused CLI regression passed: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/nodes-cli.coverage.test.ts` passed 1 shard / 19 tests.
- Focused UI/controller regression previously passed on this branch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approvals.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/nodes.devices.test.ts` passed 1 shard / 7 tests.
- Wider Windows-node/pairing/approval regression set previously passed on this branch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/call.test.ts src/cli/direct-loopback-gateway-auth.test.ts src/cli/gateway-rpc.runtime.test.ts src/cli/gateway-cli/call.test.ts src/cli/devices-cli.runtime.timeout.test.ts src/cli/devices-cli.test.ts src/cli/nodes-cli.coverage.test.ts src/cli/program.nodes-basic.e2e.test.ts src/gateway/server.node-invoke-approval-bypass.test.ts src/gateway/node-registry.test.ts src/gateway/node-command-policy.test.ts src/gateway/node-connect-reconcile.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/nodes.invoke-wake.test.ts src/infra/device-pairing.test.ts src/infra/node-pairing.test.ts src/tui/tui-command-handlers.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approvals.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/nodes.devices.test.ts` passed 7 Vitest shards / 408 tests.
- Autoreview local rerun clean: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`.
- Autoreview branch rerun clean at current head: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`.

## Windows Node Pond Proof
- Signed prerelease asset used: `OpenClawCompanion-Setup-x64.exe`, release `v0.6.0-alpha.14`, digest `sha256:36405bd72e2c11bae0aa051b551b339982a66ffb59820d977ad9983dbf0b4d98`.
- Linux gateway checkout refreshed to exact draft head `f14bcae0c03f08306d551b494cd30d45fa804ebd`; runtime reported `OpenClaw 2026.5.30 (f14bcae)` and `/health` returned live after restart.
- Remote build on the Linux gateway completed `tsdown`, CLI bootstrap guard, runtime-postbuild, and build-stamp at `f14bcae`; the final `write-plugin-sdk-entry-dts` helper still fails on that VM because Node `v22.22.1` lacks built-in TypeScript support (`ERR_NO_TYPESCRIPT`).
- Signed binary verification on both Windows boxes passed: installed `OpenClaw.Tray.WinUI.exe` under the per-user `OpenClawTray` app dir, product version `0.6.0-alpha.14+Branch.master.Sha.eb06fba21c44b5d2220e83992b8da59bfcc1e67a...`, file version `0.6.0.0`, Authenticode status `Valid`, signer `OpenClaw Foundation`.
- Pond pairing proof at refreshed gateway head passed: 2 connected paired Windows nodes, 0 pending pair requests, staleKnownNodeCount=0, and each connected node reported caps=7 and commands=20.
- Feature smoke at refreshed gateway head passed on a Windows node: `device.info`, `device.status`, `camera.list`, and `screen.snapshot` with a non-empty 640x480 PNG payload.
- Per-node command proof passed: `system.which` resolved `cmd` and `powershell` on both connected Windows nodes.
- Exec approval smoke at refreshed gateway head passed: `exec.approvals.node.get` returned enabled=true/default=deny/rules=22 on both nodes; raw `node.invoke system.execApprovals.get` was rejected; a temporary native allow rule was set via `exec.approvals.node.set`; `system.run` returned exit=0; policy restore succeeded; the same command was denied after restore.
- New CLI error copy was verified on the refreshed remote build: `nodes invoke --command system.run` exits 1 with `use an agent /exec host=node request instead of nodes invoke`.

## Known Draft Items
- `GOMAXPROCS=2 CI=true OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1 pnpm check:changed` still fails in `lint core` on unrelated repo-wide `typescript/no-unsafe-type-assertion` backlog. The run reached `src/acp`, `src/agents`, and `src/auto-reply` ambient failures before being stopped; touched-file lint for this branch is clean.
target.author: vincentkoc
